# delegate

**Instance Property**

The delegate object specified to receive peripheral events.

## Declaration

```swift
weak var delegate: (any CBPeripheralDelegate)? { get set }
```

## Discussion

For information about how to implement your peripheral delegate, see [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBPeripheralDelegate].

## Identifying a Peripheral

- **name**: The name of the peripheral.
